name: browser-device-stage
title: Browser Device Stage
description: A generic app surface in token-native device chrome (browser, window, or phone). The screen is a slot for caller img/video/HTML with a token-styled skeleton default; one settle entrance, a readable hold, and an optional screen swap.
evidence: Wave J J1-5: adversarial panel hero shelf, generic app stage with content slots over canned art

variables.label: Chrome
variables.description: Device frame drawn around the screen slot.

variables.label: Title
variables.description: Address pill text (browser) or title bar text (window).

variables.label: Swap at
variables.description: Seconds from mount start to crossfade to the second screen. 0 disables the swap.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Token the skeleton accent elements ride.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. None holds the final frame.
